*looking around, confusedly* it seems like the only people who are using the global database that costs $300 a transaction to update are... white people with excess wealth to throw around, that's weird

me, explaining to a laymen: "yeah, you know excel?" "yeah" "okay, well now imagine if we all had the same excel file open all across the world" "okay" "and now, if any of us wants to update a cell, we just pay $300..." and then I am murdered

when will my $300 database update be completed, you might ask 

"within 60 minutes"
"we are building the future of ___" they say- "you mean, on top of the database that costs $300 per transaction?" "exactly," they say
hey guys, we made a global database, it's totally the future, it just costs *checks notes* $300 each time you need to update it
